title.en: The EHT Tone Plan: RUs and Multi-RUs
title.zh: EHT 子载波布局：RU 与 Multi-RU

blocks.en: An EHT channel is not one undifferentiated block of spectrum — at the subcarrier level it is a grid of tones, and Wi-Fi 7 slices that grid into reusable building blocks called Resource Units (RUs). A 20 MHz channel can be carved into as many as nine 26-tone RUs; bigger blocks — 52, 106, 242, 484, 996 tones — stack on top of the same grid. Allocating an RU to a station is how OFDMA hands one slice of the air to one user. The whole tone plan is just the map of which tones live in which block.
blocks.zh: 一个 EHT 信道并不是一整块毫无区分的频谱——在子载波层面，它是一张由“音调（tone）”构成的栅格，而 Wi-Fi 7 把这张栅格切成一个个可复用的积木，叫做资源单元（RU，Resource Unit）。一个 20 MHz 信道最多可被切成九个 26-tone RU；更大的积木——52、106、242、484、996 个 tone——叠加在同一张栅格上。把一个 RU 分配给某个站点，正是 OFDMA 把“一片空中资源”交给一个用户的方式。整个子载波布局，本质上就是“哪些 tone 属于哪个积木”的地图。

blocks.en: Not every tone carries data. Framing each RU are special subcarriers with zero energy. DC subcarriers sit at the centre of the channel to dodge transmit leakage and receiver DC offset; guard subcarriers line the band edges; and null subcarriers sit near the DC and between neighbouring RUs to keep them from bleeding into each other. Pilot subcarriers, by contrast, do carry a known reference the receiver uses to track phase. So a 996-tone RU does not mean 996 data tones — some are pilots, and the channel around it is padded with DC, guard, and null tones.
blocks.zh: 并非每个 tone 都承载数据。围绕每个 RU 的，是一些能量为零的特殊子载波。DC 子载波位于信道中心，用来规避发射端的本振泄漏和接收端的直流偏移；保护（guard）子载波排布在频带边缘；空（null）子载波则位于 DC 附近以及相邻 RU 之间，防止它们互相串扰。而导频（pilot）子载波则相反——它承载接收机用来跟踪相位的已知参考信号。所以“996-tone RU”并不等于 996 个数据 tone：其中一部分是导频，而它周围的信道还被 DC、guard 和 null 这些 tone 填充着。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 460 150' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11'><g stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='1'><rect x='10' y='40' width='30' height='40'/><rect x='40' y='40' width='30' height='40'/><rect x='70' y='40' width='30' height='40'/><rect x='100' y='40' width='30' height='40'/><rect x='130' y='40' width='30' height='40'/><rect x='160' y='40' width='30' height='40'/><rect x='190' y='40' width='30' height='40'/><rect x='220' y='40' width='30' height='40'/><rect x='250' y='40' width='30' height='40'/></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle'><text x='25' y='64'>26</text><text x='55' y='64'>26</text><text x='85' y='64'>26</text><text x='115' y='64'>26</text><text x='145' y='64'>26</text><text x='175' y='64'>26</text><text x='205' y='64'>26</text><text x='235' y='64'>26</text><text x='265' y='64'>26</text></g><g stroke='currentColor' fill='none' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='10' y='95' width='90' height='28'/><rect x='100' y='95' width='180' height='28'/></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle'><text x='55' y='113'>106</text><text x='190' y='113'>242</text></g><g fill='currentColor' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10'><text x='145' y='25'>one 20 MHz channel = nine 26-tone RUs</text><text x='145' y='140'>bigger RUs reuse the same grid</text></g></svg>

caption.en: Inside one 20 MHz channel: nine 26-tone RUs, or fewer-but-larger RUs (52 / 106 / 242 tones) built on the same tone grid.
caption.zh: 一个 20 MHz 信道内部：九个 26-tone RU，或在同一张 tone 栅格上构建的“更少但更大”的 RU（52 / 106 / 242 个 tone）。

blocks.en: Going wider is modular. A 20 MHz and 40 MHz PPDU reuse the Wi-Fi 6 (HE) tone plan unchanged. From 80 MHz up, EHT defines an 80 MHz tone plan and then builds 160 MHz and 320 MHz by stacking multiple 80 MHz frequency subblocks side by side — each subblock carrying the same internal RU layout. A nonpunctured 80 MHz subblock used whole becomes a single 996-tone RU; if it holds smaller RUs or is partly punctured, it falls back to the finer 26/52/106/242/484-tone grid. The RU positions are fixed by tables (one each for 80, 160, 320 MHz), indexed off the DC tone at subcarrier 0.
blocks.zh: 向更宽带宽扩展是模块化的。20 MHz 和 40 MHz 的 PPDU 原封不动地沿用 Wi-Fi 6（HE）的子载波布局。从 80 MHz 起，EHT 定义了一套 80 MHz 的子载波布局，然后通过把多个 80 MHz 频率子块（frequency subblock）并排堆叠来构成 160 MHz 和 320 MHz——每个子块都携带相同的内部 RU 布局。一个未被打孔（puncture）、被整体使用的 80 MHz 子块就成为一个 996-tone RU；若它容纳了更小的 RU 或被部分打孔，则退回到更细的 26/52/106/242/484-tone 栅格。RU 的位置由表格固定（80、160、320 MHz 各一张），并以子载波 0 处的 DC tone 为索引基准。

blocks.en: Now the Wi-Fi 7 headline: Multi-RU (MRU). A single user is no longer locked to one RU size — the PHY lets one station glue several RUs together. EHT splits RUs into two families: large (242 tones and up) and small (under 242). The rule is that you only combine within a family — small RUs glue to small RUs, large RUs glue to large RUs. Small MRUs are 52+26 and 106+26 (an RU plus an adjacent 26-tone RU in the same 20 MHz). Large MRUs go all the way up to combinations like 996+484, 2x996+484, and 3x996+484 — the foundation that pairs naturally with puncturing, letting a user span the spectrum that survives around a blocked subchannel.
blocks.zh: 现在轮到 Wi-Fi 7 的重头戏了：Multi-RU（MRU，多资源单元）。单个用户不再被锁死在某一种 RU 尺寸上——PHY 允许一个站点把若干个 RU 拼接起来。EHT 把 RU 分成两个家族：大尺寸（242 个 tone 及以上）和小尺寸（小于 242）。规则是只能在同一家族内组合——小 RU 拼小 RU，大 RU 拼大 RU。小尺寸 MRU 有 52+26 和 106+26（一个 RU 加上同一 20 MHz 内相邻的 26-tone RU）。大尺寸 MRU 则一路向上，可达 996+484、2×996+484、3×996+484 这样的组合——这正是与“打孔”天然配套的基础，让一个用户能够占满某个被屏蔽子信道周围“幸存”下来的频谱。

blocks.en:
graph LR
    subgraph SB1["80 MHz subblock A"]
      R1["996-tone RU"]
    end
    subgraph SB2["80 MHz subblock B"]
      R2["484-tone RU"]
      P["punctured 40 MHz"]
    end
    R1 --- R2
    R1 -.glued into one MRU.-> U["one user: 996+484-tone MRU"]
    R2 -.-> U
blocks.zh:
graph LR
    subgraph SB1["80 MHz 子块 A"]
      R1["996-tone RU"]
    end
    subgraph SB2["80 MHz 子块 B"]
      R2["484-tone RU"]
      P["被打孔的 40 MHz"]
    end
    R1 --- R2
    R1 -.拼接为一个 MRU.-> U["一个用户：996+484-tone MRU"]
    R2 -.-> U

blocks.en: Narrow stations still get a seat. A 20 MHz-operating station can join a 40/80/160/320 MHz OFDMA transmission — the AP simply allocates it an RU or small MRU sitting inside its 20 MHz, since the wide-channel tone map does not line up with a standalone 20 MHz one. But there are explicit exclusions: certain 26-tone RUs and 52+26 MRUs that straddle a boundary are off-limits, no 106+26 MRUs are allowed, and a 20 MHz station may not transmit on a 242-tone RU in a TB PPDU.
blocks.zh: 窄带站点同样有位置。一个工作在 20 MHz 的站点也能参与 40/80/160/320 MHz 的 OFDMA 传输——AP 只需在它的 20 MHz 范围内给它分配一个 RU 或小尺寸 MRU，因为宽信道的 tone 映射与独立的 20 MHz 映射并不对齐。但存在明确的排除项：某些跨越边界的 26-tone RU 和 52+26 MRU 是禁用的，不允许使用任何 106+26 MRU，并且 20 MHz 站点不得在 TB PPDU 中用 242-tone RU 发送。

summary.en: The exact RU framing, the small/large split, and the 20 MHz exclusions
summary.zh: 精确的 RU 边界、大/小尺寸划分以及 20 MHz 排除项

blocks.en: Clause 36.3.2.1 fixes RU locations by subcarrier index relative to the DC tone at index 0: an 80 MHz PPDU runs 26-tone RU 1 at [-499:-474] up to RU 37 at [474:499], and a single 996-tone RU spans [-500:-3, 3:500] (Table 36-5). 160 MHz and 320 MHz are composed of identical 80 MHz subblocks (Tables 36-6, 36-7), with a 2x996 RU appearing at 160 MHz and a 4x996 RU at 320 MHz. Null subcarriers (36.3.2.3) sit near DC and between RUs for isolation; pilots (36.3.2.4) ride in the Data and EHT-LTF fields. Clause 36.3.2.2 defines RUs of 242 tones and larger as large-size and smaller ones as small-size, and forbids cross-family combining: small MRUs are 52+26 and 106+26 (RU plus adjacent 26-tone RU in the same 20 MHz), while large MRUs include 484+242, 996+484, 996+484+242, 2x996+484, 3x996, and 3x996+484. Clause 36.3.2.6 enumerates the 20 MHz-operation exclusions per bandwidth — e.g. for an 80 MHz PPDU a 20 MHz STA does not support 26-tone RU 5/14/24/33 or 52+26-tone MRU 2/5/8/11, supports no 106+26 MRUs at any width, and may not transmit a 242-tone RU in a TB PPDU.
blocks.zh: 36.3.2.1 节以相对于索引 0 处 DC tone 的子载波索引来固定 RU 位置：一个 80 MHz PPDU 中，26-tone RU 1 位于 [-499:-474]，一直到 RU 37 位于 [474:499]，而单个 996-tone RU 跨越 [-500:-3, 3:500]（表 36-5）。160 MHz 和 320 MHz 由相同的 80 MHz 子块组成（表 36-6、36-7），其中 160 MHz 出现 2×996 RU，320 MHz 出现 4×996 RU。空子载波（36.3.2.3）位于 DC 附近及 RU 之间以提供隔离；导频（36.3.2.4）则承载于 Data 字段和 EHT-LTF 字段中。36.3.2.2 节将 242 个 tone 及以上的 RU 定义为大尺寸、更小的为小尺寸，并禁止跨家族组合：小尺寸 MRU 为 52+26 和 106+26（一个 RU 加上同一 20 MHz 内相邻的 26-tone RU），而大尺寸 MRU 包括 484+242、996+484、996+484+242、2×996+484、3×996 和 3×996+484。36.3.2.6 节按带宽逐一列出 20 MHz 工作时的排除项——例如对一个 80 MHz PPDU，20 MHz 站点不支持 26-tone RU 5/14/24/33 或 52+26-tone MRU 2/5/8/11，在任何带宽下都不支持 106+26 MRU，且不得在 TB PPDU 中发送 242-tone RU。

cites.note: 36.3.2.1 Subcarriers and resource allocation in EHT PPDUs — RU sizes, 80 MHz tone plan (Fig 36-4), 80 MHz subblock composition for 160/320 MHz, RU subcarrier-index tables 36-5/36-6/36-7, DC/guard/null framing
36.3.2.2 Subcarriers and resource allocation for multiple RUs — large (>=242) vs small (<242) split, cross-family ban, small MRUs 52+26 / 106+26, large MRUs incl. 996+484 / 2x996+484 / 3x996+484
36.3.2.5-36.3.2.6 — 20 MHz operating STA participating in wider-bandwidth OFDMA, and the per-bandwidth RU/MRU exclusions for 20 MHz operation (26-tone, 52+26, no 106+26, 242-tone TB restriction)
